examples: The hotel stands in splendid isolation , surrounded by moorland.
The bleak moorland stretched on all sides as far as the eye could see.
The wind itself had ceased and a brilliant, deep blue sky arched high over the moorland.
On land, barely travelled roads link quiet settlements of thatched and whitewashed houses, moorland valleys and rocky mountains.
Marian Mahoney, governor of HMP Moorland, said the riots had a "profound effect" on the prison.
